description: (web + core) When causeflow-test-app is stopped, Connect or Test fails with a clear unreachable message and does not mark the integration healthy/connected successfully.

checks.evidence: fetchJson throws ValidationError('Stub upstream unreachable...') on network failure; health/connect fetch runs before integrationRepo.upsert
probe catch throws ValidationError with unreachable; updateHealthCheck only after successful HTTP response
connect returns { error: message }; probe returns { success: false, message } never false healthy
stub-upstream Connect/Test use /api/integrations/stub/{connect,probe}; error toasts use API message; success toast/lastTestedAt only when res.ok && data.success
handler tests assert message contains 'unreachable'; Playwright AC-072 asserts /unreachable/i and no connected success

notes: VERIFY-FIRST grep/static audit only (feature_list observation_method=grep). No server/browser started. Existing Core + web BFF + UI contract already satisfies AC-022.
